title: Description of Premises
text: The Licensor/Landlord hereby licenses/leases to the Licensee/Tenant the premises situated at {{property_address}} ("Premises"), together with all fixtures, fittings, and facilities forming part thereof. The Premises shall be used solely for the purpose as agreed between the Parties and for no other purpose without the prior written consent of the Licensor/Landlord. The Licensee/Tenant has inspected the Premises and is satisfied with its condition. The Licensor/Landlord warrants that it has full right and authority to license/lease the Premises and that the Premises are free from all encumbrances that would affect the Licensee/Tenant's peaceful enjoyment.
